_comment: 32 Single-Image AH creatives (personas from Stock_Bloom_Targeting_Categories). img=N -> category N EXCEPT img 11 = 2nd "有资金不敢进场" creative (category 9 angle); category 11 (频繁交易) has NO image in this batch. Built PAUSED, then split into 6 campaigns (1-1-5 x4, 1-1-6 x2) sequentially. Copy = approved 马丁 format, compliance-scanned.
